action: Add deterministic repository discovery for every continuity queue update matching operations/queue-updates/M-<digits>*.json and preserve report composition as a separate concern.

selected_from.selection_reason: M-013 explicitly handed off repository path discovery before generating the complete continuity inventory.

unresolved_inherited: full repository inventory artifact generated from a checked-out default branch
classification of intentional versus accidental forks
semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims
resolved_claims: repository-wide deterministic discovery of continuity queue update files

progress.memory: Discovery and interpretation are different layers. Repository enumeration should determine which historical records are in scope, while the existing report composer determines validity, forks, missing dependencies, and unresolved-claim inheritance.
progress.verification: Three deterministic checks passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source and test content before commit.

claim_states.observed: The discovery module filters regular files by M-<digits>*.json, sorts paths deterministically, reads UTF-8 contents, and annotates reports with explicit discovery scope and history_modified=false.
claim_states.inferred: Keeping discovery separate from interpretation prevents filesystem enumeration from silently changing lineage rules.
claim_states.proposed: Add a CLI wrapper and CI job that compose the complete checked-out repository inventory and commit or upload the generated report.
claim_states.superseded: Manual caller enumeration as the only route to a continuity inventory.
unresolved: full repository inventory artifact generated from a checked-out default branch
classification of intentional versus accidental forks
semantic matching for differently worded but equivalent unresolved claims

privacy_boundary: Public repository paths, abstract queue metadata, and synthetic test records only. Raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
handoff: Add a CLI wrapper that composes buildRepositoryContinuityInventory with buildContinuityInventoryReport, run it against a checked-out default branch, and preserve the generated report as evidence without rewriting any M-* history.
